header.name: description
header.formHint: A short description of what this prompt does.

header.name: argument-hint
header.formHint: Optionally specify a focus area or pattern to document for agents.

header.name: agent
header.formHint: The agent to use when running this prompt.

body.name: description
body.formHint: Describes what this prompt does and how to use it. This is the main content of the prompt template and should provide all the necessary information for agents understand the purpose and usage of the prompt.

body.name: discovery
body.formHint: This section is used to provide guidance for agents to search information related to the prompt. This can include relevant files to look at, relevant tools to use, or any other information that can help agents discover the necessary information to complete the task.

body.name: guidelines
body.formHint: This section is used to provide guidelines for agents to follow when executing the prompt. This can include best practices, tips, or any other information that can help agents perform the task effectively.

body.name: output
body.formHint: This section is used to provide guidance for agents on how to format the output of the prompt. This can include examples of expected output, or any other information that can help agents format their output correctly, e.g., a format to follow or specific information to include in the output.

body.name: Communication
body.formHint: Main communication behavior and context for the Agent Zero communication prompt.

body.name: Initial Interview
body.formHint: Describe how the agent should conduct requirements elicitation before starting autonomous research.

body.name: Initial Interview Requirements
body.formHint: List required dimensions the interview must clarify before research begins.

body.name: Thinking (thoughts)
body.formHint: Instructions for the thoughts field and analytical reasoning expectations.

body.name: Thoughts Analytical Framework
body.formHint: List the required analytical capabilities the agent must include in thoughts.

body.name: Thoughts Output Constraint
body.formHint: Concise machine-optimized output constraint for the thoughts field.

body.name: Tool Calling (tools)
body.formHint: Instructions for tool execution behavior and strict schema adherence.

body.name: Tool Calling Requirements
body.formHint: List optimization requirements for tool arguments and execution quality.

body.name: Reply Format
body.formHint: Describe the required response envelope and JSON-only constraint.

body.name: Reply Format Schema
body.formHint: List each required JSON field and constraints.

body.name: Rules
body.formHint: Special formatting and rendering rules for math, markdown blocks, and emphasis syntax.

body.name: Response Example
body.formHint: Example JSON response demonstrating thoughts, tool_name, and tool_args.

body.name: include-file
body.formHint: Optional include directive to append extra communication additions file.

body.name: description
body.formHint: A short description of what this prompt does.
